description: Slope chart connecting each SBE region's average SPG score in 2019 to its score in 2023, all in one neutral grey with region labels at the right end. Every region's line slopes downward; declines range from 1.6 points (North Central) to 6.0 points (Piedmont Triad).

title.subtitle: A slope chart shows direction and magnitude of change for many items at once — kept in one neutral color.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI sample school data, SY2019–2023. Style-guide demo.
